response.justification: Wei Chen is a strong senior engineer with deep open-source and Linux experience, broad technical range, and a track record of knowledge sharing, but the profile misses critical requirements for this executive-level role. German proficiency is listed as basic while the position requires minimum C1, and there is no demonstrated experience leading teams, managing client engagements, or owning architectural governance at the level this Head of Development role demands. The mismatch on the hard language requirement alone makes this a poor fit despite solid technical credentials.
strengths: Extensive hands-on experience across web, mobile, desktop, and embedded systems in modern stacks
Genuine open-source commitment (GISCollective founder, D ecosystem libraries, FOSS4G speaker) aligned with digital sovereignty focus
Strong software craftsmanship practices (TDD, CI/CD, testing tooling) and proven mentoring through workshops and courses
concerns: German listed as basic — role requires minimum C1, a hard qualification
No formal experience leading engineering teams, managing consultants, or holding operational leadership responsibility
Limited evidence of client-facing architecture advisory, requirements management, or IT security/compliance work

key_factors.factor: Lack of leadership and team management track record
Strong open-source and Linux technical background
